name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Localize video text overlays into any language without rebuilding your visuals from scratch.
problem: Businesses expanding into new markets face the costly and time-consuming task of recreating video assets whenever they need translated text overlays. Rebuilding graphics, lower thirds, and on-screen text manually wastes production budget and slows down global rollouts. Visual Translate automates the translation of in-video text while preserving the original visual design.
useCases: Localize marketing video campaigns for multiple regional markets simultaneously
Translate product tutorial overlays and on-screen instructions for international audiences
Adapt social media video content with text graphics into different languages at scale
Repurpose training or onboarding videos for multilingual enterprise teams without redesign
